_comment: Maps emoji names to descriptions. The LLM uses the descriptions to decide when to use a given emoji. Custom server emoji are looked up by name in the guild — make sure the name matches exactly what Discord shows for that emoji. Standard Unicode emoji can either be referenced by a name (e.g. 'fire' → '🔥' in the LLM's react list) or used directly as the Unicode character. The keys here are the names the LLM will reach for; for Unicode entries, you can encode them as the literal character or as a named alias.

emoji.fire: intense agreement, hype, savage, something is hot — 🔥
